# Casper AgentVault

> Autonomous operating system for on-chain AI agents. Live at https://casperagent.xyz

AgentVault is one platform — not disconnected demos. A shared wallet layer, multi-agent coordinator, and Casper settlement infrastructure power Portfolio Guardian (Finance), RWA Oracle (Compliance), Agent Marketplace (Commerce), and Session Vault (bounded agent session keys).

## Pages

- https://casperagent.xyz/ — Agent OS dashboard: wallet connect, application tabs, on-chain actions
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs — Platform introduction and application overview
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/getting-started — Connect wallet and run first actions
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/faucet — Casper Wallet setup and testnet CSPR faucet
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/guardian — Finance application: Portfolio Guardian
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/rwa — Compliance application: RWA Oracle
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/marketplace — Commerce application: Agent Marketplace
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/vault — Agent treasury: Session Vault session keys
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/architecture — OS layers, agent pipeline, settlement
- https://casperagent.xyz/docs/contracts — Escrow, Attestation, and Vault smart contracts on casper-test

## When to read

- Use `/` for the live platform and wallet-connected workflows.
- Use `/docs` to understand the agent OS and application surface.
- Use `/docs/vault` for session-key policy and agent spend limits.
- Use `/docs/architecture` and `/docs/contracts` for integration or audit context.
